productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kids Unisex Uraha Grey Sports Shoes
description: If running is what your little one likes, then there's no better way to hone the skills of those young legs than with this pair of Hyperrun 5 running shoes. Light in weight and well cushioned, kids are sure to find their energy doubling with each stride.UpperMeshed upper for enhanced breathability and comfortStrategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structureadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMeshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfortMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitErgonomically curved and padded Ortholite footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionadiPRENE inserts on the heel for enhanced cushioning and shock absorptionOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability, and has flex grooves for ease of movement Waffle pattern lugs in the forefoot and a decoupled heel for ultimate grip and tractionImpact guidance line for enhanced energy returnScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfoot and anklesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
